I need to analyze the relations within the `types` package. Looking at the code, the `types` package contains type definitions (interfaces, type aliases) in files like `types/index.js`, `types/config.js`, `types/extensions/test-analysis.js`, `types/extensions/ts-analysis.js`.

The code shown is primarily implementation code. The `types` package itself only contains type declarations (interfaces, type aliases) — no class implementations with relations between them.

Looking through the codebase for any relations (inheritance, composition, dependency) where both source and target are entities within the `types` package: the types files define interfaces like `ArchJSON`, `Entity`, `Relation`, `Member`, etc., but these are pure type definitions. There are no extractors running on the types files themselves shown here, and no explicit relation declarations between types-package entities.
